EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that callback with sales team has been arranged.
EmailTemplate.name: Sales Team - Call Back
EmailTemplate.subject: Callback Arranged
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for your email.
I have asked one of our Sales Team to get in touch with you to discuss your query.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
